chosen_action.title: Deliver live-ready comparison backlink packet for immediate manual execution

why_this_action.summary: Fresh external lanes are already inside measurement windows, StackOverflow is in a real cooldown, and the prepared comparison/backlink queue is the strongest remaining Codeberg-first lane that can still move forward through immediate manual execution.

expected_outcome: Immediate manual execution of one prepared comparison/backlink request that can create a Codeberg-first citation path without waiting for another automated lane.

measurement_window.success_metric: At least one comparison inclusion request is sent, followed by any attributable qualified repo inspection or Codeberg adoption movement.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If still unexecuted by the review checkpoint, stop refreshing the same packet and switch the next action slot to a different executable demand-capture lane.
